message: There's a new update that fixed the herb/pills bug!
changelog:
FIX, PILLS QI RATE GAIN PAST LARGE VALUES. PILLS THAT GRANT A QI RATE BONUS NOW CORRECTLY CALCULATE AND APPLY THEIR SNAPSHOT GAIN WHEN YOUR QI RATE EXCEEDS VERY LARGE NUMBERS. PREVIOUSLY THE BONUS WOULD SHOW AND APPLY AS ZERO DUE TO A NUMBER OVERFLOW, CAUSING PILLS TO HAVE NO EFFECT AT HIGH PROGRESSION. THE CALCULATION NOW USES FULL PRECISION ARITHMETIC THROUGHOUT.

FIX, HERBS QI RATE GAIN PAST LARGE VALUES. HERBS THAT PERMANENTLY INCREASE QI RATE NOW CORRECTLY CALCULATE, APPLY, AND DISPLAY THEIR GAIN WHEN YOUR QI RATE EXCEEDS VERY LARGE NUMBERS. PREVIOUSLY CONSUMING A QI RATE HERB WOULD SHOW PLUS ZERO QI PER SECOND IN THE BATCH RESULT AND APPLY NO ACTUAL GAIN DUE TO A NUMBER OVERFLOW. THE CALCULATION AND THE BATCH RESULT DISPLAY BOTH NOW USE FULL PRECISION ARITHMETIC.
